issues.description: Rest action missing duration. Text states 'cannot attack until the end of your opponent's next End Phase' → requires duration:'UntilEndOfOpponentNextTurn' or similar. Current Rest has no duration specified.

DrawCard is unconditional but effect text requires condition: 'if your opponent has a Character with a cost of 0 or with a cost of 8 or more'. Needs conditional logic checking opponent's board state before drawing.

PlayFromHand is incorrect. Effect states 'Play this Character card from your trash' — should be PlaySelf or similar that plays from trash, not from hand. Also filter restricts to 'Black' color with no justification from card text.
OnKO trigger should allow optional trashing ('You may trash'). Current structure treats it as mandatory. Needs optional wrapping or conditional structure.
